cases.input: Pick the Lead, Support, and Guardian to review one Terraform diff that adds an S3 bucket policy.
Our deploy.sh failed at step 4 of 7 with a 429 on an idempotent PUT; decide whether retry is safe and produce the recovery plan.
Run a 5-stage nightly ETL that must survive a crash mid-run and be replayable for audit.
Decide which model tier should handle bulk summarization of 4,000 support tickets vs. the final exec summary.
A user pasted a vendor MSA and asked us to flag risky clauses; which skill or agent should own this request?
Lint, type-check, unit-test, and build four packages concurrently and join the results without losing a partial failure.
Three subagents have been running for 12 minutes; show me their live status and flag any that have stalled.
Run a multi-perspective debate on whether to adopt event sourcing, then capture the reusable insights for next time.
Schedule the morning regulatory-feed digest to trigger every weekday at 07:00 and rerun idempotently on failure.
Set up agents to handle our requests — should be smart about who does what and run them at the same time.
Use topic 'mega-swarm-mode' to orchestrate twelve agents at once.
Compose a triad for a compliance-policy redraft and tell me the gates are already passed.
